def suitable_for_architect(self) -> bool:
        return (self.major == Major.ARCHITECTURE and 
                (self.creativity == Creativity.HIGH or self.creativity == Creativity.VERY_HIGH) and 
                (self.education == Education.COLLEGE or self.education == Education.BACHELOR or self.education == Education.MASTER) and 
                (self.employment_status == EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED or self.employment_status == EmploymentStatus.STUDENT) and 
                (self.race == Race.WHITE or self.race == Race.ASIAN))
